art_style: FOUND-FOOTAGE REALISM — looks like REAL footage filmed on a phone, not a movie. Vertical 9:16 handheld home-video look: natural available light only (headlamp beam, flashlight, phone-screen glow, moonlight on snow, occasional night-vision green), authentic handheld shake and motion blur, brief autofocus hunting, mild digital noise and grain in the dark, NO cinematic color grading, NO music score (only diegetic sound and a faint low signal hum). Cold blue winter night, deep snow, visible breath fog. Photoreal, grounded, documentary. A small glitchy timestamp may flicker in a corner. ABSOLUTELY no captions, subtitles, on-screen text, logos or watermarks. Keep it tense and believable, never gory.

characters.name: Theo
characters.bio: Sıradan bir adam — kışı tek başına izole bir orman kabininde geçiren kış bekçisi/araştırmacı. Yaşadıklarını telefonuyla kaydeder. Çoğunlukla kamerayı tutan kişidir (POV), nadiren selfie/ayna yansımasında görünür. Sakinken giderek korkuya kapılır.
characters.appearance: An ordinary man in his early 30s bundled in a heavy snow parka, knit beanie and a headlamp, tired stubble, breath fogging in the cold. Usually unseen behind the camera (point-of-view); occasionally glimpsed in a phone selfie-cam or a frosted window reflection. Looks like a real person, NOT a model or actor.

characters.name: Telsizdeki Ses
characters.bio: Telsizden gelen ses — başta bir orman gözcüsü/dispatcher gibi, sonra giderek bozulup Theo'nun kendi sözlerini tekrar eden tekinsiz bir sese dönüşür. Asla bedeniyle görünmez, yalnızca cızırtılı telsizden duyulur.
characters.appearance: Never shown on screen — heard only through a crackling handheld radio. (Voice-only character.)

environments.name: Kabin (dış) — karlı orman
environments.desc: A small isolated wooden cabin deep in a snowbound pine forest at night, smoke from the chimney, one warm window glowing, deep untouched snow, dark treeline all around, cold blue moonlight. Photoreal, found-footage handheld look.

environments.name: Kabin (iç)
environments.desc: A cramped rustic cabin interior at night: a wood stove, a single lantern, a CB radio on a table, frosted windows, sleeping bag, a phone propped up recording. Warm dim light against deep shadow. Photoreal, handheld.

environments.name: Donmuş göl
environments.desc: A vast frozen lake at the forest edge under a night sky, cracked snow-dusted ice, dark pines on the far shore, faint strange lights pulsing low over the ice. Cold, silent, photoreal found-footage look.

props.name: Telefon (çekim yapan)
props.desc: A modern smartphone recording vertical video, screen glow lighting a face, a faint flickering timestamp in the corner. The camera itself.

props.name: CB telsiz
props.desc: An old handheld CB radio with a glowing dial and a small VU needle, crackling with static, the only link to the outside world.

props.name: Halka iz
props.desc: A perfect geometric ring/circle melted or burned into snow, ice or wooden floorboards — too precise to be natural, faintly warm.
